alert_revisions_source_reference_check.name: alert_revisions_source_reference_check
alert_revisions_source_reference_check.value:
("alert_revisions"."source_type" = 'saved_scan' and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_id" is not null and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_revision" is not null and "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."instrument_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."watchlist_id" is null)
        or ("alert_revisions"."source_type" = 'preset_scan' and "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_id" is not null and "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_revision" is not null and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."instrument_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."watchlist_id" is null)
        or ("alert_revisions"."source_type" in ('instrument_price', 'instrument_percent_change', 'instrument_indicator') and "alert_revisions"."instrument_id" is not null and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."watchlist_id" is null)
        or ("alert_revisions"."source_type" = 'watchlist_saved_scan' and "alert_revisions"."watchlist_id" is not null and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_id" is not null and "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_revision" is not null and "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_id" is null and "alert_revisions"."instrument_id" is null)

alert_revisions_source_revision_check.name: alert_revisions_source_revision_check
alert_revisions_source_revision_check.value: ("alert_revisions"."saved_scan_revision" is null or "alert_revisions"."saved_scan_revision" >= 1) and ("alert_revisions"."preset_scan_revision" is null or "alert_revisions"."preset_scan_revision" >= 1)

notification_deliveries_terminal_timesta.name: notification_deliveries_terminal_timestamp_check
notification_deliveries_terminal_timesta.value: ("notification_deliveries"."status" = 'delivered') = ("notification_deliveries"."delivered_at" is not null) and ("notification_deliveries"."status" = 'failed') = ("notification_deliveries"."failed_at" is not null)

notification_preferences_quiet_hours_che.name: notification_preferences_quiet_hours_check
notification_preferences_quiet_hours_che.value:
("notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_enabled" and "notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_start_minute" between 0 and 1439 and "notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_end_minute" between 0 and 1439)
        or (not "notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_enabled" and "notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_start_minute" is null and "notification_preferences"."quiet_hours_end_minute" is null)

instruments_listing_dates_check.name: instruments_listing_dates_check
instruments_listing_dates_check.value: "instruments"."delisted_at" is null or "instruments"."listed_at" is null or "instruments"."delisted_at" >= "instruments"."listed_at"

ingestion_runs_request_range_check.name: ingestion_runs_request_range_check
ingestion_runs_request_range_check.value: "ingestion_runs"."requested_to" is null or "ingestion_runs"."requested_from" is null or "ingestion_runs"."requested_to" >= "ingestion_runs"."requested_from"

preset_scan_revisions_publication_check.name: preset_scan_revisions_publication_check
preset_scan_revisions_publication_check.value: ("preset_scan_revisions"."lifecycle_status" = 'published') = ("preset_scan_revisions"."published_by" is not null and "preset_scan_revisions"."published_at" is not null)

scan_run_events_transition_check.name: scan_run_events_transition_check
scan_run_events_transition_check.value: ("scan_run_events"."from_status" is null and "scan_run_events"."to_status" is null) or ("scan_run_events"."to_status" is not null)

scan_runs_source_reference_check.name: scan_runs_source_reference_check
scan_runs_source_reference_check.value: ("scan_runs"."source_type" in ('saved_scan', 'preset_scan')) = ("scan_runs"."source_id" is not null and "scan_runs"."source_revision" is not null)

scan_runs_counts_check.name: scan_runs_counts_check
scan_runs_counts_check.value: "scan_runs"."progress_total" >= 0 and "scan_runs"."progress_processed" >= 0 and "scan_runs"."progress_processed" <= "scan_runs"."progress_total" and "scan_runs"."matched_count" >= 0 and "scan_runs"."matched_count" <= "scan_runs"."progress_processed" and "scan_runs"."not_evaluable_count" >= 0 and "scan_runs"."not_evaluable_count" <= "scan_runs"."progress_processed" and "scan_runs"."warning_count" >= 0

scan_runs_timestamps_check.name: scan_runs_timestamps_check
scan_runs_timestamps_check.value: ("scan_runs"."started_at" is null or "scan_runs"."started_at" >= "scan_runs"."queued_at") and ("scan_runs"."completed_at" is null or "scan_runs"."started_at" is not null and "scan_runs"."completed_at" >= "scan_runs"."started_at") and ("scan_runs"."cancelled_at" is null or "scan_runs"."cancel_requested_at" is not null and "scan_runs"."cancelled_at" >= "scan_runs"."cancel_requested_at")

public.current_price_bars.definition: select distinct on ("price_bars"."instrument_id", "price_bars"."provider_id", "price_bars"."timeframe", "price_bars"."open_time") "id", "instrument_id", "provider_id", "timeframe", "open_time", "close_time", "open", "high", "low", "close", "volume", "is_closed", "source_timestamp", "ingested_at", "revision", "quality_status", "created_at", "updated_at" from "price_bars" order by "price_bars"."instrument_id", "price_bars"."provider_id", "price_bars"."timeframe", "price_bars"."open_time", "price_bars"."revision" desc
public.current_price_bars.name: current_price_bars
